detail.description:
Bow Wow Battle is not your typical tap-and-swipe game. Get ready to warm up your vocal cords and step into an arena where your ultimate weapon is... YOUR VOICE! 

Transform into fierce, funny dogs in the ultimate tug-of-war championship. The rules are simple: the louder you shout, bark, or scream into your microphone, the harder you pull! Do you have the lung capacity to overpower your rivals and claim victory?

KEY FEATURES:

* VOICE-CONTROLLED COMBAT: Experience a completely unique, hands-free
detail.releaseNotes: General improvements and minor bug fixes to enhance app stability and performance.
